message.content:
Read every file related to the Daily Writing Prompts feature and report their full contents. I need to understand every line to simplify the code. Read these files completely:

1. server/sql/writing_prompts.sql
2. server/sql/seed_prompts.sql (just report the structure and count, not all 150 lines)
3. server/services/promptService.js
4. server/controller/promptController.js
5. client/src/components/DailyPrompt/DailyPromptCard.jsx
6. client/src/components/DailyPrompt/DailyPromptCard.css
7. client/src/components/DailyPrompt/PromptBadge.jsx

Also find all integration points by searching for "promptService", "promptController", "DailyPromptCard", "PromptBadge", "getTodaysPrompt", "getPromptResponses", "prompt_id", "promptId" across the entire codebase. Report which files reference them and the exact lines.

content.text: I'll help you read all the Daily Writing Prompts feature files and find integration points across the codebase. Let me start by reading the files and searching for references.

1→-- Writing Prompts table
     2→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS writing_prompts (
     3→    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
     4→    prompt_text TEXT NOT NULL,
     5→    category TEXT DEFAULT 'general',
     6→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
     7→);
     8→
     9→-- Add prompt_id to journals for linking responses
    10→ALTER TABLE journals ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS prompt_id INTEGER
    11→    REFERENCES writing_prompts(id) ON DELETE SET NULL;
    12→
    13→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_journals_prompt_id
    14→    ON journals(prompt_id) WHERE prompt_id IS NOT NULL;
    15→
